variants.title: Donaldson P502418 Fuel Spin On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P502418 Fuel Spin On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Fuel Spin On, Outer Diameter: 77.0 mm, Length: 135.0 mm, Thread: 3/4-16
